creator: araujo@bsdmail.org
text:
Hey Edwin,

Submitter is maintainer.



> ----- Original Message -----
> From: "Edwin Groothuis" <edwin@FreeBSD.org>
> To: araujo@bsdmail.org
> Subject: Re: ports/111761: [PATCH] x11-toolkits/fox10: [fix OPTIONS]
> Date: Tue, 17 Apr 2007 11:47:19 UT
>=20
>=20
> Maintainer of x11-toolkits/fox10,
>=20
> Please note that PR ports/111761 has just been submitted.
>=20
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>=20
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>      http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3Dports/111761
>=20
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

>




Atenciosamente.

-- Araujo <araujo@fug.com.br>
http://experience.bsdnetwork.org
http://www.fug.com.br
